headline: Salesforce Gives Lukewarm Outlook That Fuels Disruption Fear

headline: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
summary: (Bloomberg) -- While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise. headline: Donald Trump Shouted Out Intel, Then Dell, Then Micron: Look At His Own Stock Filings To See Who May Get The Next Shoutout

headline: Morning Call Sheet: AI rally faces growing concentration risks
